statement: Temporal Visibility should replace Convex runtime tables as the primary liveness index, while Convex becomes a read model and Axiom remains deep telemetry for monitor-triggered agent loops.
rationale: Visibility and Search Attributes are designed for listing/filtering workflow executions, while Updates/Signals/Queries provide a cleaner control model than custom auto-heal mutations.
keyAssumptions: Visibility backend is configured strongly enough for required fleet queries
The team is comfortable using Temporal UI or MCP-backed status over direct table scans
validationCriteria: A monitoring loop can answer which executions are running, stalled, or failed from Temporal first
Bounded repair operations can be expressed as workflow updates
critiquePoints: Visibility may need extra backend setup and search-attribute design
MCP interaction rules may still require explicit approval for some fixes
questions: How much execution detail should still be mirrored into Convex for product surfaces?
